prompt_text:
### Demographics: 55-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 13 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia; Intermittent GI discomfort (nausea/bloating)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 2 (60-89)
Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class III)
ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 2 (60-89); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (father)
- Social history: Current smoker (20 cigarettes/day for 20 years; ~20 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Liraglutide 1.8mg once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Nitrofurantoin (100 mg twice daily for prophylaxis), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 76.3 kg; Height 161.6 cm; BMI 29.2 kg/m²; Blood pressure 124/67 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 10.0%; 9 months ago 9.5%; 6 months ago 9.0%; 3 months ago 8.5%; current 6.7%), FPG (12 months ago 246mg/dL; 9 months ago 203mg/dL; 6 months ago 252mg/dL; 3 months ago 185mg/dL; current 155mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 74.9kg; 9 months ago 73.8kg; 6 months ago 69.7kg; 3 months ago 69.7kg; current 76.3kg), Height (12 months ago 161.6cm; 9 months ago 161.6cm; 6 months ago 161.6cm; 3 months ago 161.6cm; current 161.6cm), BMI (12 months ago 29.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 28.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 27.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 27.0kg/m²; current 29.2kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 122mmHg; 6 months ago 123mmHg; 3 months ago 122mmHg; current 124mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 68mmHg; 9 months ago 67mmHg; 6 months ago 68mmHg; 3 months ago 67mmHg; current 67mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 19U/L; 9 months ago 18U/L; 6 months ago 17U/L; 3 months ago 16U/L; current 23U/L), AST (12 months ago 24U/L; 9 months ago 14U/L; 6 months ago 22U/L; 3 months ago 15U/L; current 19U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.6mg/dL; current 0.6mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 75mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 74mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 75mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 73mL/min/1.73m²; current 72mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 69mg/g; 9 months ago 52mg/g; 6 months ago 72mg/g; 3 months ago 69mg/g; current 56mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 92mg/dL; 9 months ago 94mg/dL; 6 months ago 91mg/dL; 3 months ago 86mg/dL; current 90mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 52mg/dL; 9 months ago 53mg/dL; 6 months ago 53mg/dL; 3 months ago 52mg/dL; current 54mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 142mg/dL; 9 months ago 121mg/dL; 6 months ago 141mg/dL; 3 months ago 138mg/dL; current 132mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.0g/dL; 6 months ago 13.0g/dL; 3 months ago 12.2g/dL; current 12.7g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
